qa_pairs.question: How do tenants affect bucket name collisions in the New Arbutus Cloud Object Storage?
qa_pairs.answer: In New Arbutus Cloud Object Storage, bucket name collisions will only occur within an individual project (tenant) instead of across all projects in Arbutus.

qa_pairs.question: What information is required to access buckets publicly in New Arbutus Cloud Object Storage without authentication?
qa_pairs.answer: For public access to buckets without authentication in New Arbutus Cloud Object Storage, the tenant must be specified. The Tenant ID is identical to the OpenStack Project ID.

qa_pairs.question: What is the recommended tool for migrating Object Storage to the New Arbutus Cloud, and what is a notable limitation of this tool?
qa_pairs.answer: rclone is recommended for migrating Object Storage to the New Arbutus Cloud. A notable limitation is that rclone will not copy bucket ACLs, so all access will initially be defaulted to private in the new location.
